title: Brevo Contact
description: Represents a contact in the Brevo platform with email, phone, attributes, and list memberships used for transactional and marketing messaging.

id.description: Unique internal identifier of the contact.

email.description: Primary email address of the contact.

phone.description: Phone number of the contact in international format.

emailBlacklisted.description: Whether the contact's email address is blacklisted from receiving messages.

smsBlacklisted.description: Whether the contact's phone number is blacklisted from receiving SMS.

listIds.description: IDs of contact lists the contact belongs to.

attributes.description: Custom attribute values for the contact profile as key-value pairs. Keys correspond to attribute names defined in the account.

createdAt.description: UTC date-time when the contact was created.

modifiedAt.description: UTC date-time when the contact was last modified.

statistics.description: Email campaign interaction statistics for the contact.

messagesSent.description: Total number of emails sent to the contact.

hardBounces.description: Total number of hard bounces for the contact.

softBounces.description: Total number of soft bounces for the contact.

opened.description: Total number of emails opened by the contact.

clicked.description: Total number of email links clicked by the contact.

unsubscriptions.description: Total number of unsubscription actions by the contact.

ContactAttribute.description: Defines a custom contact attribute used to extend contact profiles with additional data fields.

type.description: Data type of the attribute value.

enumeration.description: Possible enumeration values for category-type attributes.

value.description: Numeric value of the enum option.

label.description: Display label for the enum option.

ContactList.description: Represents a contact list used to organize contacts into groups for targeted campaign sending.

totalSubscribers.description: Total number of subscribed contacts in the list.

totalBlacklisted.description: Total number of blacklisted contacts in the list.

folderId.description: ID of the folder containing the list.

createdAt.description: UTC date-time when the list was created.
